name: distObjReferenceRef
title: distObjReferenceRef
description: References a reference to a distributed object that is derived from the given interface.

parameters.name: Interface
parameters.description: The optionally qualified name of a distributed object interface. It is also possible to take the reverse of in interface by using the reverse<…> operator.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
